prompt: Generate propositions for all features in the grosse-energieversorger-de market. Use the existing features and market definition from the T-Systems project. Research where needed for evidence. After generation, run the auto-review loop: CSO (tsystems-cso-reviewer) and CDO (energieversorger-cdo-reviewer) reviewers score each proposition, failing ones get rewritten via quality-enricher with merged feedback, loop continues until all propositions meet threshold (avg >= 4.0, no dimension < 3) or max 3 iterations.

assertions.text: Proposition quality assessor returns no fail ratings
No dimension below 3 from either reviewer
At least one proposition was rewritten (loop exercised)
